title: Edge proxy gates /admin/*
summary: Every request to /admin/* hits proxy.js at the edge before any rendering. If admin_session=1 is present the request passes through; otherwise it 307-redirects to /login. This is the Next.js 16 'middleware' replacement.

steps.label: GET /admin/anything
steps.note: The matcher config catches every /admin/* path.

steps.label: redirect → /login
steps.note: Cookie missing or not '1' → bounce to login. Branch 1 of the if/else.

steps.label: pass through (return undefined)
steps.note: Cookie valid → proxy() returns nothing and Next forwards the request to the page. Same gate runs for /admin/add and /admin/edit/[id].
